name: SQLQueryCmd
Description:
Multiple Instance job to run SQL command in the Before SQL and After SQL option in ODBC stage.

Main SQL does nothing (SELECT 1).
Before SQL processing parameter Command1.
Quotes in SQL have to be escaped \\'
Entire command put in double quotes.
After SQL processing parameter Command2.
Constraint field must be lised as NOT NULL.
Command2 can be blank without aborting the job.




MODIFICATIONS:

======================================================================================================================================
Developer	Date		Project/Altiris #	Change Description			Development Project               Reviewer		Review Date
======================================================================================================================================
Brent Leland            2022-03-08             Sybase to SQL         Original Programming                               IntegrateDev1

Annotations:
Before SQL Command
Drop table when used to cleanup and end of processing

Example: "DROP TABLE tempdb..TMP_CDMA_COMP":Table.TableTimestamp
After SQL Command
Used to create table.
Command can be blank to allow drop table in Before SQL command.
Constraint field must be listed as NOT NULL.
Concate table name parameter with colon :
Example: 'CREATE TABLE tempdb..TMP_MPI_CDC_DRVR':TempTable:'(MEME_CK INTEGER NOT NULL,OP CHAR(1),CONSTRAINT BEKEY':TempTable:' PRIMARY KEY NONCLUSTERED (MEME_CK))'
If the Before or After SQL Command is not used, enter an empty string ''
Run Before and After main SQL commands passed in as parameters.
